methodology.concept: If stolen wages had been paid and invested, what would the estate be worth?
methodology.return_source: Robert Shiller, 'Irrational Exuberance' dataset, decade averages
methodology.confidence_vocabulary: Modeled, with 90% credible interval propagated from wage gap model

aggregate.note: Top 50 documented NLB players only. The full league estate would be substantially larger.
